summary: Made two surgical seam edits: carried Chapter 9's manual-release residue into the opening and established the final paper list under the orange fridge magnet so Chapter 11's opening image lands cleanly. The opening scaffold was already distinct from the visible adjacent opening, so no broader rewrite was needed.
edits: Added the folded manual-release carbon copy, badge, and apartment token to Nita's opening beat to preserve continuity from the previous chapter's exit.
Added Nita placing the final list under the smiling orange fridge magnet to set up the next chapter's opening object and location.
